title: Upon An Old Woman.
content:
Old Widow Prouse, to do her neighbours evil,
    Would give, some say, her soul unto the devil.
    Well, when she's kill'd that pig, goose, cock, or hen,
    What would she give to get that soul again?
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon An Old Woman.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
